selection_method: Fixed rubric: sum of the 6 fixed scores (1-5 each, max 30). Highest total wins. Tie-break order (not needed this run): source_reliability, then general_user_impact, then recency. No human override for 'more interesting' allowed.
selected_topic: Meta removed its "Muse Image" Instagram AI feature within days of launch after privacy backlash over using public photos as AI-image references.
selection_reason: candidate_2 scored the maximum 30/30 across all six fixed criteria (highest of the three candidates; candidate_1=28, candidate_3=25), with no tie to break.

rejected_candidates.reason_not_selected: Lower total score (28 vs 30); not disqualified, simply outscored.
Lower total score (25 vs 30), driven mainly by lower general_user_impact (3) since the effect on ordinary listeners is indirect.
